Part two of this journal thought experiment about an idea I've stolen from the Amish: that technology can help but it can also distance us from ourselves and those that are important.  

What would you add to the list?   

(Note: I'm not saying never do technology. But I think it's good to constantly reflect on what is this thing giving me and what is it taking.)   

Part one: https://mastodon.social/@donthatedontkill/116693183036425103   

#Amish #journaling #thinking #technology #sortingItOut
